title: tragacantha sesquiflora
intro: Tragacantha sesquiflora, also known as the common broom or genista, is a flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Tragacantha sesquiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha sesquiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
